sentences.arabic: حِينَ سَأَلَهُ أَخُوهُ طَلَبَ مِنْهُ مَالًا فَأَعْطَاهُ بِخِفَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Kad ga je brat zamolio tražeći novac, dao mu je rado.
sentences.translationEn: When his brother asked him for money he gave it readily.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يُحَاسِبْهُ وَلَمْ يَذْكُرْ مَا أَعْطَاهُ.
sentences.translation: Nije ga pozivao na odgovornost niti spominjao što mu je dao.
sentences.translationEn: He did not hold it over him or mention what he had given.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لَهُ: نَحْنُ إِخْوَةٌ وَالْإِخْوَةُ يُسَاعِدُونَ بَعْضَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Rekao mu je: Mi smo braća, a braća si pomažu.
sentences.translationEn: He told him: We are brothers and brothers help each other.

sentences.translation: Brat mu je zahvalio i dovio za njega dobro.
sentences.translationEn: The brother thanked him and prayed for his wellbeing.
